response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the entire video duration (00:00-02:24). 2. Observed that the visuals consist of a single static promotional image for a concert, with text overlays. 3. Listened to the audio track and determined it is an instrumental background music piece with no vocals present. 4. Concluded that no vocal music analysis or lyric retrieval is required.
response.global_summary: A promotional end-screen video for the Hololive English concert titled 'Serendipity', featuring a static image of the performers and instrumental background music.

scenes.description: A static promotional image for the Hololive English 4th Concert 'Serendipity' is displayed, with text indicating that the sneak peek has ended. Instrumental background music plays throughout the entire video.
